name: COLUMN

meta.data_required: one ordered categorical dimension + one non-negative measure

see_instead.when: the data is a time series

use_when: comparing magnitude across categories that carry a natural order (sites, phases, units)
not_when: the message is rank (use CH-RNK-01 BAR-H, sorted)
time series (use CH-TIM-01 LINE; columns over time only for few periods)

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the finding with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: string, appears once, on the first value label
data_shape.categories: array of {label: string, value: number >= 0, highlight?: bool}, at most one highlight, INPUT ORDER PRESERVED

scale.note: columns scale to the max value; no axis, no ticks, direct labels carry the numbers

rules: input order preserved; sorting by value is CH-RNK-01's job
direct value labels above each column; no value axis, no gridlines
at most one highlighted column (role primary); all others role muted
unit appears once, on the first value label only
columns centered in equal slots; bar_width fixed
anti_patterns: sorting by value when order is natural (that chart is CH-RNK-01)
value axis plus direct labels (pick direct labels)
labels rotated 45 degrees (names too long means wrong chart)
qa: title states a finding with a number
